subject: DQ BLOCK: 1 Venue Missing Geocode — 39 Events Blocked
body:
Harvey,

## Blocked Events

39 PRACTICA events from sftangowith-us cannot load to PROD.

## Root Cause

1 venue missing lat/lng geocode:

| Venue | City | Events Blocked |
|-------|------|----------------|
| Couture Yoga & Dance Studio | Milbrae | 39 |

## Address for Geocoding

Likely address: "Couture Yoga & Dance Studio, Milbrae, CA"

## Action Needed

Geocode this venue:
```sql
UPDATE venues SET lat = ?, lng = ? WHERE id = 30;
```

Then Porter can load the 39 events.

— Porter
